title: Tonys Roundtable: Six Broadway Standouts on Overcoming Their Fears, Provoking Difficult Conversations and Making Magic Eight Times a Week
summary: Past winners John Lithgow ('Giant') and Nathan Lane ('Death of a Salesman'), perennial nominees Joshua Henry ('Ragtime') and Shoshana Bean ('The Lost Boys') and first-time finalists Rose Byrne ('Fallen Angels') and Marla Mindelle ('Titaníque') dish to The Hollywood Reporter's Scott Feinberg.
